response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified songs via on-screen text: '忘れじの言の葉' and 'モエチャッカファイア' (Lyrics, Music: 弐羽). 2. response.global_summary: A 3-part video featuring a 3D performance by Anya Melfissa, consisting of two vocal songs ('Wasureji no Kotonoha' and 'Moechakka Fire') and an ending dialogue interval.
